description.en: Retail and workshop furniture ex-UK: carton strength checks, moisture barriers for long sea spells, and delivery slots sized to Turkish lifts and door heights.

keyword.en: furniture export UK Turkey retail, flatpack sea packing, showroom logistics Hanbros UK

text.en:
New goods ship differently from used households—commercial invoices, HS lines and origin statements matter. We coordinate with your supplier for collection windows, pallet or loose floor loading, and labelling that survives transhipment.

Photograph serial plates where present; note glass panels and stone tops so extra bracing is booked before the truck arrives.

title.en: New furniture UK to Turkey | Hanbros UK
